sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81006" key="perdiki/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περδικ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑτ]</pron> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίθος</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of stone, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
